rules.message: Raw tag — prefer next/image for automatic optimization. If using , confirm alt= is set (empty alt='' for decorative).
console.log in source — route through a logger or gate behind process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'.
dangerouslySetInnerHTML — XSS risk. Sanitize input or use a safer alternative. If intentional, add a short comment explaining the source-of-truth and sanitization.
